62.reason: [Use of uninitialized variable 'r' when the first node in the adjacency list is the one to be deleted. If p is the first node (i.e., graph[i].link == p), then 'r' was never assigned a value before being used.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Use of uninitialized variable 'r' when the first node in the adjacency list is the one to be deleted. If p is the first node (i.e., graph[i].link == p), then 'r' was never assigned a value before being used.]
